title: Daoist Canon: Shangqing Jing (Highest Clarity) (Section 2)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Shangqing Jing (Highest Clarity)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Shangqing Jing (Highest Clarity)

translation.text: From the Shangqing Jing (Highest Clarity) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
